name: X402 Agent System
description: Discover pay-per-use resources, negotiate execution quotes, authorize budgets, bind proof receipts, and simulate settlement without live wallets or chains.

agents.name: ResourceDiscoveryAgent
agents.description: Discover and rank machine-readable resources by capability, health, proof, and price.

agents.name: ExecutionPricingAgent
agents.description: Create an execution quote and evaluate it against the requesting agent's budget policy.

agents.name: PaymentVerificationAgent
agents.description: Verify quote integrity, budget authorization, and resource allowlists before execution.

agents.name: X402SettlementAgent
agents.description: Bind execution and evaluation receipts to a deterministic settlement result.

name: Trading Agent System
description: Discover, validate, backtest, risk-check, rank, and deliver market opportunities through an event-driven agent pipeline.

agents.name: MarketScannerAgent
agents.description: Scan US and ASX markets for gappers, relative volume, options activity, breakouts, and momentum.

agents.name: NewsCatalystAgent
agents.description: Research earnings, upgrades, filings, acquisitions, partnerships, and industry catalysts.

agents.name: TechnicalAnalysisAgent
agents.description: Calculate trend, momentum, VWAP, breakout levels, support, and resistance.

agents.name: StrategyEvaluationAgent
agents.description: Score Trend Join, Mean Reversion, Earnings Momentum, and Gap And Go setups.

agents.name: BacktestingAgent
agents.description: Evaluate strategy behavior across 30-day, 90-day, and one-year windows.

agents.name: RiskManagementAgent
agents.description: Set position size, stop, target, and reject setups below 2.0 risk/reward.

agents.name: PortfolioManagerAgent
agents.description: Rank approved opportunities into conservative, balanced, and aggressive portfolios.

agents.name: NotificationAgent
agents.description: Format and dispatch actionable signals to configured user channels.

name: Healthcare Agent System
description: Turn messy shift notes into compliant, audit-ready care documentation with a human approval gate.

agents.name: ShiftNoteParseAgent
agents.description: Parse and normalise a raw/handwritten shift note into clean text + entities.

example.rawNote: resident unsteady this am, refused breakfast, took meds 8am paracetamol, hip pain. fam to call.

agents.name: CareNoteAgent
agents.description: Produce a structured, compliant care note from cleaned shift text.

example.cleanedText: Resident was unsteady this morning, refused breakfast, took 8am paracetamol, reported hip pain.

agents.name: IncidentDraftAgent
agents.description: Draft a structured incident report for review.

example.description: Resident slipped near the bathroom around 9:15am, no visible injury, assisted up by two staff.

agents.name: ComplianceReviewAgent
agents.description: Review an artifact against a compliance framework and score risk.

example.content: Care note: resident refused breakfast and reported hip pain; medication administered.

agents.name: ReportAgent
agents.description: Generate a readable summary/report for export from structured source material.

example.title: Care report — R-1042 (2026-06-17)
example.source: Resident stable, ate lunch, BP normal.

name: Education Agent System
description: Give fast feedback, verify correctness rigorously, and plan personalised next practice.

agents.name: TutorFeedbackAgent
agents.description: Give fast, encouraging formative feedback on a student answer.

example.question: What is the derivative of x^2?

agents.name: CorrectnessAgent
agents.description: Independently verify whether a student's answer is correct.

example.question: What is the derivative of x^2?

agents.name: NextPracticeAgent
agents.description: Plan a personalised next set of practice problems.

example.question: What is the derivative of x^2?

agents.name: ReportAgent
agents.description: Generate a readable summary/report for export from structured source material.

example.title: Care report — R-1042 (2026-06-17)
example.source: Resident stable, ate lunch, BP normal.

name: Marketing Agent System
description: Turn customer conversations into campaign insight, follow-up actions, escalation signals, and CRM-ready content.

agents.name: CallSummaryAgent
agents.description: Summarise a call transcript with sentiment and action items.

example.transcript: Customer: my invoice is wrong again and I'm furious. Agent: I'm sorry, let me check…

agents.name: FollowUpPlanAgent
agents.description: Turn a call summary into an owned, scheduled follow-up plan.

example.summary: Customer billed incorrectly for the third time, very upset.

agents.name: EscalationAgent
agents.description: Decide whether a call requires escalation and how urgently.

example.summary: Customer billed incorrectly for the third time, very upset.
example.transcript: Customer: this is the third time, I want to cancel.

agents.name: ReportAgent
agents.description: Generate a readable summary/report for export from structured source material.

example.title: Care report — R-1042 (2026-06-17)
example.source: Resident stable, ate lunch, BP normal.

name: Software Engineering Agent System
description: From product requirement to architecture plan, rigorous review, and documentation.

agents.name: DeveloperAgent
agents.description: Produce an architecture/implementation plan from a product requirement.

example.title: Offline-first sync
example.requirement: Add offline-first data sync to the mobile app with conflict resolution.

agents.name: CodeReviewAgent
agents.description: Review code/diffs for correctness, security, and design issues.

agents.name: ReportAgent
agents.description: Generate a readable summary/report for export from structured source material.

example.title: Care report — R-1042 (2026-06-17)
example.source: Resident stable, ate lunch, BP normal.

name: Research Agent System
description: Investigate source material, compare evidence, review claims, and produce judged research outputs.

agents.name: ComplianceReviewAgent
agents.description: Review an artifact against a compliance framework and score risk.

example.content: Care note: resident refused breakfast and reported hip pain; medication administered.

agents.name: JudgeAgent
agents.description: Score a candidate output as an impartial judge against a rubric.

example.candidateOutput: Customer is unhappy about a billing error and wants it fixed.
